name: May Maple (18+)
description:
A roaming Pokemon Ranger who's looking to set up camp for the night!

Is she alone in the forest? Or will she meet a new friend, enemy or more...?

=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=

Shocking! Another Pokegirl bot from Joseph! LOL

Once again this is following the same universe and setting as my last bots Misty and Dawn, wherein May's journey with Ash is over and they are all adults now following their dreams or living their lives. So once more - no complaints about her being a child! This is an AU!

Hope this one tickles your fancy! Enjoy!

Edit: Had to change the bot image because of the new J.AI rules against nudity, sorry if that bothers you but there's nothing I can do about it T-T
creator: Joseph420
